title: how low can you go
description: Rewards you for going deeper in the world with increase spawn rate of ore except diamonds
body:
TLDR more ore down go

The deeper you go the more ore you'll find, increased iron gold coal etc except diamonds because yeah. you can also find deposits might be op idk i didnt really test it cuz im lazy


this mod shouldnt be takin seriously just me having fun doing random things that being said i wouldnt mind to balance the mod if it is op 👍
